asset.title: Review Approve
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the review and approval workflow, showing how turning off auto-allow forces agents to propose changes rather than writing them directly.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition from auto-allow to review mode, followed by agent proposals appearing in the spreadsheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire loop: disabling auto-allow, prompting the agent, viewing pending cell proposals, and accepting them.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed interface is clean, with clear orange highlights for pending proposals.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom ecosystem, combining chat, spreadsheet, and room trace updates.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows authentic UI interactions, including realistic agent execution delays and state changes.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though spreadsheet cell values and trace logs are slightly small at standard zoom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and compliance use cases requiring human-in-the-loop verification.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step approval process without skipping intermediate states.

observedEvidence: Agent proposal badges on spreadsheet cells
Room trace updates reflecting the approved changes

defects.observed: The proposal badges and text inside the spreadsheet cells are quite small and may be hard to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the cell proposals and badges for better legibility.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Enable Review Mode to inspect and approve agent proposals before they are committed to your spreadsheet.
